writing.title: Writing Task 1: Make predictions and quick decisions
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) making predictions and quick decisions, using will/won't.
writing.sampleAnswer: I think it will rain tomorrow. It's getting cold, so I will close the window now. The meeting probably won't be too long, maybe just one hour.
checklist: Dùng will cho dự đoán không chắc chắn
Dùng will cho quyết định tức thì
Có ít nhất 1 câu phủ định won't

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your plans
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing your plans, using going to.
writing.sampleAnswer: I am going to visit my hometown this weekend. I already arranged everything and booked the train ticket. My goal this year is to improve my English.
checklist: Dùng am/is/are + going to + V đúng dạng
Có ít nhất 1 bằng chứng/chuẩn bị cụ thể đã làm
Mô tả được mục tiêu rõ ràng
